prompt: Create an ultra-realistic vertical beauty close-up portrait of a young East Asian woman with short dark brown hair with wispy bangs falling across her forehead. Frame tightly from forehead to upper chest in a 9:16 crop, with the face filling almost the entire image and slightly tilted toward the viewer. Show exactly 2 visible brown eyes with moist catchlights, 2 natural eyebrows, 1 softly raised hand resting against the left cheek, and 1 pair of plump lips puckered in a gentle kiss expression. Emphasize highly realistic skin texture: visible pores, tiny bumps, subtle freckles and moles, natural redness on the cheeks, dewy highlights on the nose and under-eye area, and soft peach-pink blush. Make the lips the focal point: very glossy translucent pink lips with strong wet specular highlights, plump and jelly-like. Use natural soft window lighting, shallow depth of field, intimate editorial beauty photography, realistic eyelashes, minimal makeup, warm skin tones, no jewelry, no text, no watermark, no heavy retouching. Background should be dark and blurred, with a small hint of a white top near the bottom edge. Camera style: macro portrait lens, extremely detailed, photorealistic, high-resolution skin and lip texture.
promptEn: Create an ultra-realistic vertical beauty close-up portrait of a young East Asian woman with short dark brown hair with wispy bangs falling across her forehead. Frame tightly from forehead to upper chest in a 9:16 crop, with the face filling almost the entire image and slightly tilted toward the viewer. Show exactly 2 visible brown eyes with moist catchlights, 2 natural eyebrows, 1 softly raised hand resting against the left cheek, and 1 pair of plump lips puckered in a gentle kiss expression. Emphasize highly realistic skin texture: visible pores, tiny bumps, subtle freckles and moles, natural redness on the cheeks, dewy highlights on the nose and under-eye area, and soft peach-pink blush. Make the lips the focal point: very glossy translucent pink lips with strong wet specular highlights, plump and jelly-like. Use natural soft window lighting, shallow depth of field, intimate editorial beauty photography, realistic eyelashes, minimal makeup, warm skin tones, no jewelry, no text, no watermark, no heavy retouching. Background should be dark and blurred, with a small hint of a white top near the bottom edge. Camera style: macro portrait lens, extremely detailed, photorealistic, high-resolution skin and lip texture.
promptZh: 创作一张超写实的竖构图美妆特写肖像，主角为 一位年轻的东亚女性，留着 深棕色短发，额前带有轻盈的空气刘海。采用 9:16 的比例进行紧凑构图，从额头到上胸部取景，面部几乎填满整个画面并略微向观众倾斜。画面需清晰呈现 2 只带有湿润眼神光的棕色眼睛、2 条自然的眉毛、1 只轻柔贴在左脸颊上的手，以及 1 双微微嘟起、呈现轻柔亲吻表情的丰盈双唇。强调高度写实的皮肤质感：可见的毛孔、细小的凸起、淡淡的雀斑和痣、脸颊自然的红晕、鼻尖和眼下的水润高光，以及柔和的桃粉色腮红。将双唇作为视觉焦点：极具光泽的半透明粉色双唇，带有强烈的湿润镜面高光，质感丰盈如果冻般。使用自然的柔和窗光，浅景深效果，营造亲密的杂志美妆摄影风格，呈现真实的睫毛、极简妆容、暖色调肤色，无首饰、无文字、无水印、无过度修图。背景应为深色且模糊，底部边缘隐约可见一点白色上衣。相机风格：微距人像镜头，细节极其丰富，照片级写实，高分辨率皮肤与唇部纹理。
